created_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was created.

handler.description: The handler for the given custom plugin.

id.description: A string representing a UUID (universally unique identifier).

name.description: The name to associate with the given custom plugin.

schema.description: The schema for the given custom plugin.

tags.description: A set of strings representing tags.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was last updated.

example.handler: return { VERSION = '1.0,0', PRIORITY = 500, access = function(self, config) kong.service.request.set_header(config.name, config.value) end }
example.name: set-header
example.schema: return { name = 'set-header', fields = { { protocols = require('kong.db.schema.typedefs').protocols_http }, { config = { type = 'record', fields = { { name = { description = 'The name of the header to set.', type = 'string', required = true } }, { value = { description = 'The value for the header.', type = 'string', required = true } } } } } } }
